integrate_amazon_sqs_into_the_workflow_c: Integrate Amazon SQS into the workflow. Can send messages to SQS queues.
send_a_message_to_an_amazon_sqs_fifo: Send a message to an Amazon SQS FIFO queue with a message group ID and deduplication ID for ordered, exactly-once delivery.
send_a_structured_job_message_to_an_amaz: Send a structured job message to an Amazon SQS queue to hand off background work.
success_or_error_message_describing_the_: Success or error message describing the operation outcome
